title: Otherworld Biomes
body:
Otherworld Biomes is a mod that is continuously is getting worked on. This Mod adds in biomes that introduce more exploration and adventure.

Currently, this mod adds in its first Biome, **The Demented Plains**.

![Demented Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f1d5e1c9e7162026c142fb31783379cced4a20_0.webp)
This biome contains the Demented Trees which have a crude gray look.

At night, the biome becomes infested with zombies, skeletons, and a new mob, the **Demented Spider**.

Along with this, there is also a new weapon, the **Poison Blade**. ![Poison Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/552f3da517f080ef10fe68f7f80625993a6e5031_0.webp)
